svg.text: NMH Vout: +15V ±1.2% (typ) = 14.82V–15.18V → well above 7809 min. input of 11V ✓
RPi 5V: 4.75–5.25V per spec → within NMH Vin range of 4.5–5.5V ✓
RPi 4B: 5V pins can source up to ~3A total (board dependent). NMH at full load draws ~230mA → safe ✓
Recommended: ferrite bead on 5V feed to HAT
600Ω @ 100MHz ferrite (e.g. BLM18AG601SN1D) between RPi pin and NMH Vin — attenuates digital switching noise from Pi
NMH switching frequency ~150kHz — linear 7809 after provides >60dB rejection; ripple at preamp supply <1mV expected
